_comment: Template for a fresh machine. Copy this file to config.json and fill in the values marked <REPLACE_ME>. See SETUP.md.
project_root: <REPLACE_ME: absolute path to the Revenue Model folder, e.g. C:\Users\yourname\Documents\Revenue Model>
email_recipient: <REPLACE_ME: email address that receives failure/variance alerts, e.g. asbiei@prophix.com>
